name: Circular Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1 red bell pepper, halved and seeded
1 yellow bell pepper, halved and seeded
1 medium eggplant, sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast whole peppers over a gas flame or under a broiler until completely blackened. Place in a paper bag to cool.
2. Peel, cut the cooled peppers in half and remove seeds.
3. Cut eggplant into 1/2 inch slices. Brush with olive oil and sear on a grill or hot skillet until brown on both sides. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Halve bread lengthwise using a serrated knife, removing the top and bottom halves.
5. Brush the bottom half of the bread with 1/4 cup oregano lemon dressing.
6. In the bottom half of the sandwich, layer fillings in this order: ham, eggplant slices, one kind of salami, peppers, mozzarella, remaining salami, and basil leaves.
7. Brush the inside of the top half of the bread with the remaining dressing.
8. Place the top half onto the sandwich to enclose it.
9. Wrap the sandwich tightly in waxed paper or plastic wrap.
10. Place a tray or baking sheet on top of the sandwich and weigh it down with several cans for about 1 hour.
